# String Less Equal

String less than or equal comparison

```perl
$less_eq = $left le $right;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$less_eq = $left le $right;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$less_eq = $left le $right;
```
